# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to the Civic Decision Engine.

Please provide the following information to help maintain transparency and clarity within the project.

---

## Summary

Provide a short description of the change.

What does this pull request do?

---

## Motivation

Why is this change necessary?

Explain the problem or improvement being addressed.

---

## Type of Change

Please select the relevant option(s):

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Model or behaviour logic update

---

## Description of Changes

Describe the changes introduced by this pull request.

Include relevant files, modules, or logic affected.

---

## Testing

Describe how the change was tested.

Include steps, example inputs, or outputs where applicable.

---

## Transparency & Accountability Considerations

If applicable, explain how this change affects:

- decision transparency
- auditability
- behaviour modelling
- civic accountability

---

## Additional Notes

Add any other context or information that may help reviewers understand the change.

---

## Checklist

Before submitting, please confirm:

- [ ] The change follows the project's contribution guidelines.
- [ ] Code remains readable and well-documented.
- [ ] Changes maintain transparency and clarity of the system.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if needed.
